channel.title: theBalancedBriefNLbreakingNews
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from theBalancedBriefNLbreakingNews, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Winning numbers drawn in Saturday’s Powerball
item.description: The winning numbers in Saturday evening’s drawing of the "Powerball" game were: 27-28-36-48-49, Powerball: 21

item.title: It's on: US and Canada face off for Olympic gold in men's hockey as Winter Games come to a close
item.description: The U.S. and Canada meet in the men's gold-medal hockey game at the Winter Olympics after each went 5-0 to advance

item.title: Blizzard warnings send East Coast scrambling to prepare for heavy snow and strong winds
item.description: Emergency officials in New York City, New Jersey, Boston and communities along the East Coast are rushing to prepare for an intense winter storm, fore...

item.title: Homeland Security suspends TSA PreCheck and Global Entry airport security programs
item.description: The U.S. Department of Homeland Security is suspending the TSA PreCheck and Global Entry airport security programs as a partial government shutdown co...

item.title: A policy wonk who wants Nancy Pelosi's House seat is unafraid of a fight
item.description: The state lawmaker favored to succeed Nancy Pelosi in the House is no stranger to the national spotlight
